ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tract */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the tract */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the tract is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the tract */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the tract is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the tract */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the tract */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tract where the property is located */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "price_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "price_nom" REAL /* Nominal total price of the property */,
  "change" INTEGER /* Indicator for change in price */,
  "sale" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the tract */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost associated with the property */,
  "change_nom" REAL /* Nominal indicator for change */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single family, condo, townhouse) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Size of the lot in acres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent involved in the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, financed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Real estate agency the agent belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "average_price_sqft" REAL /* Average price per square foot for the year */,
  "price_change_rate" REAL /* Rate of price change compared to the previous year */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total sales volume in the market for the year */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Market index (e.g., strong, stable, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES properties ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, realtor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market analysis, property valuation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, sms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
